markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To define the core problem and shape the product's strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=2915.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Core Problem:** Clients are "flying blind" on website performance, relying on agencies for opaque updates. This leads to missed opportunities (e.g., failing to fix a decaying top-performing page) and high churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3642.0)
  - [**The Solution:** Build a "Robinhood for websites" by making the **page** the central unit of analysis. This connects strategy (Opportunities), work (Assignments), and performance data (GA/GSC) into a single, actionable view.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4020.0)
  - [**The UI Strategy:** Replace the current fragmented UI with a "Map at the Mall" model. This will provide a clear, intuitive workflow that guides users through the core process: Identify → Assign → Evaluate.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=6145.0)
  - [**The Urgency:** The project is critical for retention. The current operational-only client updates are failing to prove ROI, causing churn. The goal is to deploy a functional version in \~6 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=10026.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: "Flying Blind" on Website Performance

  - [Clients lack visibility into their website's performance, relying on agencies for opaque updates.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Current Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
    1.  [**Audit:** A one-time SEMrush/Airtable snapshot identifies content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
    2.  [**Work:** New pages are published based on the audit.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
    3.  [**Reporting:** A Looker dashboard pulls data from GA (on-site behavior) and GSC (search visibility), but is often ignored or broken.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Case Study: Lovable (Success)**](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Context:** A $25k/mo engagement that grew to $40k/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Process:** The client pushed for performance data, prompting a Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Result:** The team proved ROI (150 signups, \~$50k ARR in 4 months), leading to a scope increase.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
      - [**Flaw:** The process was reactive, not proactive; success depended on the client pushing for data.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Case Study: Ambient AI (Failure Mode)**](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3642.0)
      - [**Context:** A high-performing engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3642.0)
      - [**Failure:** The two top-performing pages, driving 80% of traffic, began to decay. The team missed the signal and continued publishing new content instead of fixing the core problem.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3642.0)
      - [**Result:** Overall performance flattened and declined, leading to churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3642.0)

### The Solution: A "CRM for Pages"

  - [The **page** is the central unit connecting all parts of the content lifecycle.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4020.0)
  - [**Page Analytics Model:** A structured framework for evaluating each page.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4383.0)
      - [**Health:** Technical vitals (e.g., speed, indexability).](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4493.0)
      - [**Quality:** Content relevance and depth.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4550.0)
      - [**Visibility:** Impressions from search and AI.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4596.0)
      - [**Traffic:** Inbound visits.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4612.0)
      - [**Engagement:** On-page behavior (e.g., time on page).](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4655.0)
      - [**Conversion:** Progress toward a business goal.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4655.0)
  - [**Two Critical Views:**](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3386.0)
      - [**Per-Page View:** For operators to diagnose issues and prioritize work.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=4514.0)
      - [**Aggregate Portfolio View:** For stakeholders to see high-level ROI and justify renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=3386.0)

### The UI Strategy: "Map at the Mall"

  - [The UI must reflect the core workflow, not just be a collection of tabs.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=5852.0)
  - [**Core Workflow:** Opportunities (Hypotheses) → Assignments (Work) → Pages (Output) → Evaluation (Performance).](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=5760.0)
  - [**Proposed UI Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=7819.0)
      - [**Primary Navigation:** A global header with sections for `Opportunities`, `Assignments`, and `Performance`.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=7827.0)
      - [**`Performance` View:** A master-detail table of pages with key metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=8925.0)
          - [Clicking a page opens a detail pane with the full analytics model.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=8925.0)
          - [Action buttons (e.g., `Create Opportunity`) enable immediate action from insights.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=8752.0)
      - [**Strategic Grouping:** The `Performance` view must support grouping by **Clusters** (e.g., topic, content type).](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=9570.0)
          - [Clusters are the strategic unit, enabling users to see which content strategies are working and double down.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=9608.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Confirm availability for an additional meeting on **Feb 4th** to accelerate progress.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=9906.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=9819.0)
      - [Pause work on the current analytics feature to focus on this new direction.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=9819.0)
      - [Continue building the backend data pipeline for page signals.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=9819.0)
      - [Refine the UI/UX strategy based on the "Map at the Mall" model.](https://fathom.video/share/QNyY-5b2Kbx9-33-DKGnJoacN1LERyok?tab=summary&timestamp=6145.0)
